meaning: 帕尔马[西班牙巴利阿里群岛首府]
examples: Customerswait in a busy shop in a market in Palma, Mallorca.
I found one answer last year, at a fish farm called Veta la Palma.
But Veta la Palma is not just a fish farm; it's also a bird sanctuary.
Electricity has only come to northern port town of Palma in the last year or so.
De Palma cleverly exploited New Orleans's stand-up graves and the decadent elegance of its Garden District.
